title: Horizons | Season 2
description: The Client-Pack for season 2 of my Minecraft series. This time medieval-fantasy themed.
body:
The Modpack for season 2 of my own Minecraft series. This time the theme is medieval-fantasy feauturing tons of mods to make the experience as immersive as possible.

For the full experience this pack should be played on a server. The server-side pack will be available soon.

# Features
- 🌍 Beautiful Worlds. Regions Unexplored and BetterX make your world look better than ever
- ❄️ With Fabric Seasons your world will change throughout the 4 seasons
- 🧬 Choose an origin and a class upon world creation
- ⚔️ Loads of weapons and armor to choose from
- 🏡 Settle down and build with tons of beautiful blocks
- 📊 Skill your own character the way you want
- 🌈 Shaders and Resourcepacks like [hyper realistic sky](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hyper-realistic-sky/version/1.16) to make the world look even better 

And tons more, hop in to explore the new horizons!
